---
title: "D2P2_motherScript"
author: "Alexandre Poncin"
format: html
editor: source
---

## 1. Chargement des packages ----

```{r Chargement des Packages, include=FALSE}
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(
  data.table,
  qualtRics,
  tictoc,
  dplyr,
  purrr,
  snakecase,
  stringi,
  here,
  ggplot2,
  tidyr,
  forcats,
  textclean
)
```

## 2. Chargement des fonctions ----

```{r}
# Fonctions de recodage de strings
source(here("04_functions", "funRecodeAndVerifyBin.R"))


# Fonctions utilitaires
source(here("04_functions", "funRunScript.R"))


# Fonctions de visualisation

```
